title: Sus Sand and Gravel
description: ඞ Makes suspicious sand and gravel easier to distinguish from regular sand and gravel. ඞ
body:
ඞ Makes suspicious sand and gravel easier to distinguish from regular sand and gravel. ඞ 

![A screenshot showing the new textures of suspicious sand and suspicious gravel.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/13e300352e42b636275267bccde844aa75eb575b.png)

ඞ Pack is supported up to the latest version. ඞ
